skill.name: email-campaign-writer
skill.description: 邮件营销文案生成 — 产品信息→标题5选1+正文+CTA+A/B测试方案
skill.summary: Generate email marketing copy with subject line variants, body text, CTAs, and A/B test plans from product information
skill.author: Hermes-Sedimentary

security_audit.summary: Both static findings are false positives. The 'weak cryptographic algorithm' flag on SKILL.md:4 is a false match on Chinese UTF-8 byte sequences in a marketing description line. The 'high file entropy' flag (6.25 bits) is expected for UTF-8 encoded Chinese text and does not indicate obfuscation or encryption. The skill contains no executable code, no network requests, no file system access, and no environment variable access. It is a pure instructional prompt template for generating email marketing copy.

dangerous_patterns.title: Weak cryptographic algorithm (FALSE POSITIVE)
dangerous_patterns.description: Static analyzer flagged 'Weak cryptographic algorithm' on SKILL.md:4. The line contains only Chinese marketing description text with no cryptographic code. This is a false positive caused by the UTF-8 byte sequence of Chinese characters coincidentally matching a crypto pattern heuristic designed for ASCII text.

dangerous_patterns.title: High file entropy (FALSE POSITIVE)
dangerous_patterns.description: Static analyzer flagged high file entropy (6.25 bits) at SKILL.md:1 as potential obfuscation or encrypted content. Chinese UTF-8 text naturally has higher Shannon entropy than ASCII English. A 34-line Chinese markdown file with entropy of 6.25 bits is normal and expected, not indicative of malicious obfuscation.

content.user_title: Generate Email Marketing Campaign Copy Instantly
content.value_statement: Turn product descriptions into complete email marketing campaigns. This skill generates subject line options, email body copy, call-to-action buttons, and A/B testing plans so you can launch campaigns faster without hiring a copywriter.
actual_capabilities: Generate 5 subject line variants from a product description
Write complete email body copy with structured sections
Create call-to-action (CTA) text for different campaign goals
Produce A/B test plans comparing subject lines and CTAs
Output content in Chinese for Chinese-speaking audiences
Work across Claude, Codex, and Claude Code platforms
limitations: Output is in Chinese only, not suitable for English campaigns
Generated copy requires human review before sending to real audiences
Does not integrate with email sending platforms or APIs
Cannot access real-time analytics or past campaign performance data

use_cases.title: Product Launch Email Campaign
use_cases.description: A product manager provides a new product description and receives a complete launch email with multiple subject line options, body copy, and A/B test variants.

use_cases.title: E-commerce Promotional Campaign
use_cases.description: An e-commerce operator inputs a promotion detail and gets a ready-to-send promotional email with urgency-driven CTAs and subject line A/B test pairs.

use_cases.title: Freelancer Client Deliverables
use_cases.description: A freelance marketer uses the skill to quickly produce professional email drafts for multiple clients, reducing turnaround time from hours to minutes.

prompt_templates.title: Simple Product Email
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate an email marketing campaign for this product: [paste product name and description]. Include 5 subject line options, the email body, and a call-to-action.
prompt_templates.scenario: You have a new product and need a basic promotional email quickly.

prompt_templates.title: Campaign with Target Audience
prompt_templates.prompt: Create an email campaign for [product name]. Target audience: [describe audience]. Key benefit: [main benefit]. Tone: [formal/casual/urgent]. Include subject line variants, body copy, CTA, and an A/B test plan.
prompt_templates.scenario: You know your audience and want tailored messaging with specific tone requirements.

prompt_templates.title: Full Campaign with A/B Testing
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a complete email marketing campaign for [product/service]. Provide: (1) 5 subject line options ranked by expected open rate, (2) full email body with header, value proposition, social proof placeholder, and CTA, (3) 3 A/B test scenarios comparing different subject lines and CTA variations, (4) recommended send time and follow-up strategy.
prompt_templates.scenario: You need a comprehensive campaign strategy including testing and optimization.

prompt_templates.title: Seasonal Promotion Campaign
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a seasonal promotional email campaign for [holiday/event]. Product: [product name]. Discount offer: [offer details]. Create urgency-driven subject lines, email body that leverages seasonal themes, limited-time CTAs, and A/B tests for discount framing (percentage vs. absolute amount).
prompt_templates.scenario: You are running a seasonal or holiday promotion and need themed copy.

output_examples.input: Product: Smart water bottle that tracks hydration and reminds you to drink water
output_examples.output: Subject line options: (1) Your personal hydration coach has arrived (2) Never forget to drink water again (3) The smart bottle that 10,000 people are using (4) Doctors recommend: the healthy habit that takes 3 seconds (5) Limited launch: Smart hydration tracking at 40% off. Body: Opening with hydration statistics, product benefits in three sections, customer testimonial placeholder, and a clear CTA button.

output_examples.input: Product: Online Python course for beginners, 30-day money-back guarantee
output_examples.output: Subject line options: (1) From zero to programmer in 30 days (2) Why 5,000 people chose this Python course (3) Your first Python program - written today. Body: Pain-point opening about career growth, course structure with 4 modules, instructor credentials, money-back guarantee reassurance, and enrollment CTA. A/B test plan: Compare curiosity-driven vs. urgency-driven subject lines.

best_practices: Provide detailed product information including target audience and key benefits for best results
Always review and customize generated copy before sending to real recipients
Use the A/B test plans to systematically improve open and conversion rates over time
anti_patterns: Do not send generated copy directly without human review for accuracy and brand voice
Avoid using all subject line variants in a single campaign without proper audience segmentation
Do not input confidential or proprietary product information you would not want processed by an AI

faq.question: What does this skill generate?
faq.answer: It generates email marketing copy including subject lines, body text, call-to-action buttons, and A/B testing plans from your product information.

faq.question: What language does the output use?
faq.answer: The skill generates content in Chinese. It is designed for Chinese-speaking marketers and audiences.

faq.question: Can this skill send emails for me?
faq.answer: No. This skill only generates the copy text. You need to use your own email platform to send campaigns.

faq.question: How many subject line options does it provide?
faq.answer: It generates 5 subject line options for each campaign, which you can use for A/B testing.

faq.question: Does it work with Claude Code?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill works with Claude, Claude Code, and Codex platforms.

faq.question: Is the generated copy ready to use immediately?
faq.answer: The copy is a strong starting point, but you should review and adjust it to match your brand voice and specific audience before sending.
